chief_complaint: A 70-year-old man presented with intermittent fever.
history: The patient had a history of liver transplantation and splenectomy for hepatitis C virus-related cirrhosis, with long-term immunosuppression. He was on intermittent fever for an unknown duration.
exam: Vital signs: fever. Physical examination findings: not specified.
labs: Blood cultures grew Campylobacter fetus, and cerebrospinal fluid (CSF) cultures confirmed it. ECG, other imaging, and other tests not mentioned.
